title: An Act to Fund State Government
last_senate_action: 4/29/2026 - Died in Possession of the Committee Upon Conclusion of the 132nd Legislature and PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES ( DEAD ).

actions.description: Received by the Secretary of the Senate on February 27, 2025 and REFERRED to the Committee on APPROPRIATIONS AND FINANCIAL AFFAIRS pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Died in Possession of the Committee Upon Conclusion of the 132nd Legislature and PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES ( DEAD ).
